subject: [PATCH v7 1/2] mm: bypass mmap_miss heuristic for VM_EXEC readahead

reviews.author: Oscar Salvador (SUSE)
reviews.summary: Provided a Reviewed-by tag without any specific comments or suggestions.

2026-06-01.patch_summary: This patch series proposes to bypass the mmap_miss heuristic for VM_EXEC readahead, which is intended to prevent speculative mmap readahead when a file appears to be a random-access workload. However, this heuristic does not fit well with the VM_EXEC path, as it has its own constraints and is bounded by the VMA. The patch aims to keep the counter accounting symmetric by skipping both increments and decrements for VM_EXEC mappings.
